div.h3: Victim Selection & Write-Back Logic Engineering Spec

ul.li: Latency: Variable based on Dirty Bit (Disk Seek Penalty)
Page Table Lock: Must be held during Phase 3-4.
I/O Parallelism: Phase 3 write-back can be async if hardware allows page pinning.
Interrupts: Masked during critical TLB flush.

g.text: PFN (20b) | AVL (3b) | G | S | D | A | C | W | U | R | V
